intro.heading: My orders
intro.description: Claims, purchases, delivery, acceptance, and disputes live here. The marketplace only keeps listings that are still tradable.

payment.heading: Awaiting payment
payment.description: Payment comes first so the fulfiller can start.

delivery.heading: Awaiting delivery
delivery.description: The fulfiller is submitting the result or progress.

acceptance.heading: Awaiting acceptance
acceptance.description: The result is in; the payer needs to accept or dispute it.

dispute.heading: In dispute
dispute.description: The original flow is paused until cancellation or final decision.

complete.heading: Complete
complete.description: These orders are finalized and kept for reference.

empty.title: No orders for this account
empty.description: Orders will appear here after you buy or claim an item.

generic.title: Orders failed to load
generic.description: Order or account data did not return correctly. Try again in a moment.

auth.title: Sign in again
auth.description: The current browser session cannot read orders. Sign in again to continue.

forbidden.title: This account cannot view the order list
forbidden.description: The order list shows orders where this account is a participant or reviewer.

intro.description: This page shows where the order stands, who owns the next step, and what happens next.

accessDenied.heading: This account cannot view this order
accessDenied.description: Order {orderNo} is visible only to the payer, fulfiller, reviewer, or project handler.
accessDenied.note: Switch to an order participant account, or use a backoffice review entry with order access.

proof.heading: Delivery record
proof.description: This record drives acceptance and dispute decisions.
proof.empty: No delivery record has been submitted yet.
proof.linkOnlyDescription: The fulfiller did not add a delivery note.
proof.noSummary: The fulfiller did not add a delivery note.

delivery.heading: Delivery requirements
delivery.description: These are the two facts users need first when judging the order result.

progress.heading: Execution progress
progress.description: Only progress updates submitted by the fulfiller are shown.

parties.heading: Parties
parties.description: The payer, recipient, and payment amount for this order.

currentState.paymentDueAt: Complete payment by {date}. If payment times out, the order will close and the item capacity will be released.
currentState.paymentPending: Delivery will continue after payment is captured; unpaid orders may time out and release item capacity.
currentState.deliveryDueAt: Payment is captured. The fulfiller should submit delivery or progress by {date}; missing this SLA will not block delivery, but the buyer may use it for follow-up or dispute.
currentState.disputeWindowEnds: The window ends at {date}. You can still start a dispute before then; after it ends, the order will complete.
currentState.disputeWindowUnknown: Delivery has been approved and the dispute window is still open. You can still start a dispute during this window.

finalSummary.closed: The order is closed and settlement will not continue.
finalSummary.sharesPending: The order is complete and Virtual Share release is waiting for approval.
finalSummary.sharesReady: The order is complete and Virtual Shares will follow the settlement record.
finalSummary.moneyDone: The order is complete and payment settlement is final.

summary.cancelled: The dispute was cancelled and the order returned to its previous acceptance path.
summary.accepted: The dispute has a final decision: accept the original delivery.
summary.closed: The dispute has a final decision: close the original order.
summary.active: The dispute is active. Open the details page to review the source, evidence, cancellation entry, and final decision entry.

settlement.heading: Settlement
settlement.description: Shows where the money or Virtual Shares are now and who handles the next step.
settlement.waitingApproval: Waiting for Virtual Share release approval
settlement.waitingDisputeWindow: Waiting for dispute window to end
settlement.releaseReady: Virtual Shares will be released after the order completes.
settlement.approvalPending: Virtual Share release is waiting for handler confirmation.

events.hasMore: Showing the latest 3 items. {hidden} older records are hidden.

event.timeout_release: Item lock timed out and was released

management.heading: Dispute management
management.note: The platform will decide after checking both sides' materials.

notes.heading: Handling notes
notes.description: The platform will decide after checking both sides' materials. Acceptance, delivery, and settlement actions are frozen while the dispute is open.

cancelled.title: Dispute cancelled
cancelled.action: Return to the order page and continue the original acceptance path.

final.title: Dispute finalized
final.action: The detail page keeps the source, evidence, and handling history.

assign.title: Waiting for reviewer assignment
assign.action: Select a reviewer so the review flow can move toward a decision.

appeal.title: Second review is available
appeal.action: Explain what the first review missed and request another review.

eventDetail.cancelled: Cancellation reason: {reason}; the order returned to {status}.

actionPanel.heading: Next step
actionPanel.description: Actions are based on the order status: delivery record, payment, acceptance, dispute, and review.
actionPanel.emptyActions: There are no available actions for the current order status.

defaults.appealReason: The first review missed relevant context; requesting a second review.
defaults.cancelDisputeReason: Both sides confirmed the delivery is valid and are cancelling this dispute.
defaults.openDisputeReason: Opened dispute review from the order page.

errors.missingPaymentExtra: OKX payment details are missing extension data.
errors.missingPaymentExtraVersion: OKX payment details are missing version data.
errors.createPaymentFirst: Create an OKX payment session first.
errors.walletMissing: No wallet extension was detected. Install or enable OKX Wallet / MetaMask and try again.
errors.requirementsMissing: OKX payment details have not been generated yet.
errors.walletAccountMissing: The wallet did not return an account.
errors.walletConnectFailed: Wallet connection did not complete. Try again.
errors.walletSwitchFailed: X Layer was not selected, so payment cannot continue yet.
errors.walletSignFailed: Wallet signature did not complete. Try again.
errors.walletRequestFailed: Wallet action did not complete. Try again.
errors.walletRequestTimeout: Wallet response timed out. Start payment again.
errors.invalidPaymentPayload: The external wallet data format is invalid. Regenerate it and try again.

progress.heading: Progress update (optional)
progress.description: This only records work-in-progress. To send the order for review, use Submit delivery result above.
progress.summaryPlaceholder: Describe what changed in this step and what comes next.

proof.summaryPlaceholder: Describe the delivery, links, and execution source
proof.attachmentHint: Supports PNG / JPG / WEBP / PDF. Add at least one attachment before submitting proof.

autoDelivery.heading: Submit delivery result
autoDelivery.description: This is the final delivery action. After submission, the order moves to review.
autoDelivery.summaryPlaceholder: Describe what you delivered and how the {reviewer} should review or use it.
autoDelivery.urlPlaceholder: Add a result link the {reviewer} can access
autoDelivery.attachmentHint: Supports PNG / JPG / WEBP / PDF. Links and attachments are saved to the order delivery record.
autoDelivery.waitForPayment: The {payer} needs to pay before you can submit the delivery.

instantDelivery.heading: Instant delivery
instantDelivery.done: Delivery result has been written to the order.
instantDelivery.waiting: The system will deliver automatically after payment succeeds.

stockDelivery.heading: Delivery content
stockDelivery.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the content manually.

disputeOpen.heading: Open dispute
disputeOpen.description: The order pauses acceptance and enters dispute handling.
disputeOpen.reasonPlaceholder: Explain what missed the completion standard and what outcome you expect.
disputeOpen.evidenceUrlPlaceholder: Screenshot, PR, ticket, or delivery record link
disputeOpen.attachmentHint: Supports PNG / JPG / WEBP / PDF. Evidence is used only for this dispute.
disputeOpen.confirmDescription: The order pauses acceptance and enters dispute handling.

disputeManagement.heading: Dispute management
disputeManagement.cancelHint: Cancelling returns the order to its pre-dispute status.
disputeManagement.cancelPlaceholder: Explain why this dispute is being cancelled
disputeManagement.cancelConfirmDescription: Cancelling closes this dispute and returns the order to the acceptance path from before the dispute.
disputeManagement.appealHint: Add what the first review missed and request a second handling pass.
disputeManagement.appealPlaceholder: Explain why a second review is needed
disputeManagement.overrideConfirmDescription: The platform will give the result directly, and the order will move to a final status.

payment.heading: Payment status
payment.backendSessionHint: The server creates the payment session; system records are the source of truth.
payment.abandonConfirmDescription: The order will close and item capacity will be released.

disabled.settled: This order has already been paid. Payment is closed.
disabled.buyerOnly: This account can view payment status, but only the buyer can complete payment.
disabled.payerOnly: This account can view payment status, but only the {payer} can complete payment.

authorized.label: Confirming
authorized.title: Payment confirming
authorized.description: Wallet authorization has been submitted, but on-chain capture is still pending. Delivery and acceptance stay locked until capture completes.

paid.label: Paid
paid.title: Payment complete
paid.description: On-chain settlement is complete. Payment is closed; continue with delivery or acceptance.

failed.label: Failed
failed.title: Last payment failed
failed.description: The last payment did not complete. Signing again reuses this order and refreshes the payment status.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.title: Payment cancelled
cancelled.description: This payment was cancelled. Signing again starts a new payment attempt.

refunded.label: Refunded
refunded.title: Payment refunded
refunded.description: Funds have moved into the refund result. Payment is closed for this order.

disputed.label: In dispute
disputed.title: Payment in dispute
disputed.description: This payment needs manual handling. Complete the dispute or refund flow first.

pending.label: Pending payment
pending.title: Waiting for wallet signature
pending.description: Sign with your wallet. The system will sync the payment result automatically.

missing.label: Not created
missing.title: Waiting to create payment details
missing.description: Generate OKX payment details first, then pay with your wallet.

description.offer: Buyers choose a sale option. After payment, the order moves into delivery.
description.request: Fulfillers choose a task to accept. After the publisher pays, delivery begins.

marketSelection.projectNotePlaceholder: Add execution notes for this task.
marketSelection.buyerNotePlaceholder: Add a note for the fulfiller: account info, style, or delivery preferences.
marketSelection.loginPrompt: After login, you will return here to complete this action.

notes.title: Purchase notes
notes.quantityValue: Purchases are currently one item at a time

stockDelivery.heading: Platform-held inventory
stockDelivery.description: The platform locks inventory and delivers automatically after payment succeeds.
stockDelivery.confirmValue: One held inventory item is delivered after payment

payment.okxDescription: Only OKX Wallet payment is currently supported.
payment.sharesDescription: This transaction settles in shares. The order page shows the settlement progress.

confirm.deliverableFallback: Deliver according to the content description
confirm.acceptanceFallback: Confirm against order proof and completion standards
confirm.disputeValue: A dispute can be opened from the order page after delivery
confirm.refundValue: After order close or final dispute close, settlement records determine handling

errors.orderMissing: The order was submitted, but no order number was returned. Refresh and check the order status.

requestItemPicker.empty: This request has no open tasks to accept yet.
requestItemPicker.emptyDescription: Acceptance options will appear here after the publisher opens specific tasks.
requestItemPicker.heading: Claimable tasks
requestItemPicker.description: Choose a task and review the delivery requirements and completion standards. Delivery starts after funds are in place.
requestItemPicker.buyerNotePlaceholder: Add delivery preferences, reference links, or account information.
requestItemPicker.loginPrompt: After login, you will return here and continue claiming this item.
requestItemPicker.waitingState: This task cannot be accepted right now. View the existing order or wait for a status update.

stockDelivery.heading: Platform-held inventory
stockDelivery.description: The platform locks inventory and delivers automatically after payment succeeds.
stockDelivery.confirmValue: One held inventory item is delivered after payment

errors.invalidRecipient: Enter a valid receiving wallet address.
errors.clipboardReadFailed: Could not read the clipboard. Paste the wallet address manually.

recipient.label: Receiving wallet address
recipient.hint: Enter the executor's OKX / X Layer USDC receiving address. The publisher pays this address after accepting your claim.

confirm.disputeValue: Open a dispute from the order page after delivery
confirm.refundValue: After order close or final dispute close, settlement records determine handling
